# VaultFront

> A convoy-driven browser strategy warfront in public-unlaunched alpha.

## Core URLs
- Landing: https://vaultsparkstudios.com/vaultfront/
- Public runtime: unavailable
- Join alpha: mailto:founder@vaultsparkstudios.com?subject=VaultFront%20alpha%20interest
- How to play: https://vaultsparkstudios.com/vaultfront/#how-to-play
- Source: https://github.com/VaultSparkStudios/VaultFront

## What this project does
VaultFront is a browser strategy game built from OpenFrontIO. Its original
direction emphasizes capturing objectives, escorting convoys, jamming routes,
and converting coordinated deliveries into decisive pressure. It is not yet
declared launch-ready; staging, identity, contact delivery, and human playtest
evidence remain explicit gates.

## Rights
Source code follows the repository's GNU Affero General Public License v3
obligations. OpenFrontIO attribution remains in CREDITS.md and LICENSING.md.
VaultSpark-original branding, content, assets, and designs retain their
applicable rights.

## Studio
A VaultSpark Studios LLC project. https://vaultsparkstudios.com
Contact: founder@vaultsparkstudios.com (temporary alpha-intake address)
